name: Fumi's Kahuku Shrimp (Ala Moana)
tagline: The legendary North Shore truck that moved to Ala Moana's Makai Food Court — same garlic butter shrimp recipe, now easier to reach from town.
mustOrder: Garlic butter shrimp — the signature dish, drenched in buttery garlic sauce
Hot and spicy shrimp — serious heat with great flavor underneath
Shrimp scampi — lighter preparation, still packed with garlic
parking: Ala Moana Center parking structure, free for first 4 hours
talkStory: Fumi's started as one of the original Kahuku shrimp trucks on the North Shore, run by the Robello family who farmed their own shrimp in nearby aquaculture ponds fed by natural mountain spring water. The Ala Moana Makai Food Court location brings that same garlic butter recipe to town without the 45-minute North Shore drive. Order both the garlic shrimp and scampi for comparison, and always ask for extra rice — you'll need it to mop up every drop of that legendary sauce.
